name: Vegan Macaroni & "Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Lightly oil a 1-1/2 quart baking dish and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, place the cooked pasta.
4. In a skillet, bring sherry to a simmer over medium heat.
5. Add green onions and sauté for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
6. Add tomatoes and chives; sauté for another 2 minutes until the tomatoes are slightly softened.
7. Toss the sauce with pasta and set aside.
8. In a small bowl, dissolve cornstarch in cold vegetable broth.
9. Pour into the skillet and stir to combine; cook over low heat until simmering.
10. Add shredded tofu cheddar, mustard, pepper, and salt. Stir until thickened.
11. Spoon the mixture into the prepared baking dish.
12. Sprinkle bread crumbs on top.
13. Bake for 20 minutes.
14. Serve with a green salad.
